visual_description: In a dimly lit, green-hued room, two men are in a tense confrontation. The man on the left, with dark hair and wearing a dark jacket, is being pushed back by the man on the right. The second man, who has short, graying hair and is dressed in a light-colored suit jacket, aggressively shoves the first man. In the background, a wall of white tiles is visible, along with a window covered by a metal grate. The camera is shaky, capturing the chaotic movement of the altercation. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed in white. The audio begins with a man shouting in a loud, aggressive, and commanding tone, "干什么干什么干什么!" (What are you doing? What are you doing? What are you doing!). His voice is filled with anger and urgency, as if he is trying to intimidate or control someone. The camera cuts to a close-up of the man in the suit. His face is filled with an intense, angry expression as he looks slightly off-camera. The background is a blur of the same green-lit, tiled environment. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner.
